zh.Ilfracombe, Barnstaple, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文易爾福拉可姆
zh.Georgeham, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文格奧智哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Dennis於1579年11月3日出生在英國英格蘭戴文易爾福拉可姆時，她的父親John Dennis29歲，母親Katherine Rayle24歲。她於1600年9月25日與John Parker Sr.在英國英格蘭戴文格奧智哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1601年4月20日在英國英格蘭戴文享年21歲。

zh-hans.Georgeham, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文格奧智哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Dennis于1579年11月3日出生在英国英格兰戴文易爾福拉可姆时，她的父亲John Dennis29岁，母亲Katherine Rayle24岁。她于1600年9月25日与John Parker Sr.在英国英格兰戴文格奧智哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1601年4月20日在英国英格兰戴文享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dennis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Dec
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Aleksander, Andrzej, Casimir, Ignacy, Jerzy, Krystyna, Krzysztof, Malgorzata, Mikolaj, Stanislaw, Tadeusz.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name Dionizy, Polish form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

variants.name: Denny
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English Den(n)y, a pet form of the personal name Denis (see Dennis ). Compare Tenney .

English: habitational name from Danny in Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, recorded as Danye in 1343. Alternatively, the name may arise from Denny in Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, but no medieval evidence with a habitative preposition has been found in the case of the latter.
Scottish: habitational name from Denny in Stirlingshire.

variants.name: Diniz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Augusto, Celso, Francisco, Luis, Ricardo, Rogerio, Alvaro, Anselmo, Antero, Carlos.  Portuguese Joao, Marcio.
Portuguese: from the personal name Dinis, a vernacular form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Denes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Bela, Laszlo, Miklos, Tibor, Aranka, Balint, Endre, Ferenc, Lajos, Zoltan.  Jewish Imrich, Meyer.  Romanian Doina, Matei, Radu.
Hungarian (Dénes): from the personal name Dénes, from Greek Dionysios (see Dennis ). The surname Dénes is also found in Slovakia; compare 2 below.
Slovak (Deneš and Déneš) and Romanian (also Deneş): from the Hungarian personal name Dénes ‘Dennis’, or an adaptation of the Hungarian surname Dénes (see 1 above).

variants.name: Dennett
meanings: English: from a pet form of Middle English Denis (see Dennis ), or possibly from a pet form of Denise, as, for example, Denote, a female character in Piers Plowman.

variants.name: Dinges
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ). Compare Dings .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Dings
meanings: Dutch and German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ). Compare Dinges .

variants.name: Dinis
meanings: Portuguese and Galician: from Dinis, a Portuguese personal name equivalent to Dennis .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Dennis was born on 3 November 1579, in Ilfracombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Dennis, was 29 and her mother, Katherine Rayle, was 24. She married John Parker Sr. on 25 September 1600, in Georgeham, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 April 1601, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Dennis est née le 3 novembre 1579, à Ilfracombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Dennis, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Katherine Rayle, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Parker Sr. le 25 septembre 1600, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1601, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Dennis am 3. November 1579 in Ilfracombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Dennis 29 und ihre Mutter Katherine Rayle 24. Sie hat am 25. September 1600 in Georgeham, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Parker Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. April 1601 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Dennis è nata il il 3 novembre 1579 nel Ilfracombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Dennis, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Katherine Rayle, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Parker Sr. il 25 settembre 1600, nel Georgeham, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 aprile 1601, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Dennisが1579年11月3日にイギリスイギリスデボンイルフラコンベで生まれた時，父John Dennisは29歳，母Katherine Rayleは24歳であった。1600年9月25日にイギリスイギリスデボンジョージェハムでJohn Parker Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1601年4月20日にイギリスイギリスデボンで21歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Dennis(이)가 1579년 11월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이프라코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Dennis(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Rayle(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1600년 9월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 조그함에서 John Parker Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1601년 4월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 November 1579–20 April 1601: 3 de novembro de 1579–20 de abril de 1601
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Dennis nasceu em 3 de novembro de 1579, em Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Dennis, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Rayle, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Parker Sr. em 25 de setembro de 1600, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1601, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 21 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Dennis родилась 3 ноября 1579 г. в местности илфракомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Dennis было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Rayle, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Parker Sr. 25 сентября 1600 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 апреля 1601 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год.

es.3 November 1579–20 April 1601: 3 de noviembre de 1579–20 de abril de 1601
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Dennis nació el 3 de noviembre de 1579, en Ilfracombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Dennis, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Katherine Rayle, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Parker Sr. el 25 de septiembre de 1600, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1601, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años.
